name: Saudara AI
long_description:
Saudara AI is an AI broker connecting American brands with vetted overseas factories.

US brands import $3T in goods a year and lose billions to ghost suppliers, hidden fees, and blown deadlines. The factories that actually deliver sit behind decades-old relationships outsiders can't break into. We were born into them.

Every deal runs through a real human broker, supercharged by AI that handles sourcing, quoting, QC, and logistics. 10x faster, at a fraction of the cost.

Sourcing is the largest broken market in global trade. We're the on-ramp.
one_liner: AI sourcing broker linking brands to top global factories.
